    Senior Living Communities in Pleasanton, CA

    1 senior living community in Pleasanton, Alameda County, California - offering Independent Living, Assisted Living, Memory Care, CCRC / Life Plan.

    New to this? Start with our step-by-step guide to how to choose a senior care facility, and see what each level of care means.

    Communities in Pleasanton

    • Stoneridge Creek

      Pleasanton, CA

      • Independent Living
      • Assisted Living
      • Memory Care
      • CCRC / Life Plan

      The Bay Area's largest life plan community, a 50-acre campus in Pleasanton with resort-style amenities: restaurant-style dining venues, a...

    Comparing communities in Pleasanton

    When you have a shortlist, tour each community more than once - including one unannounced visit - and ask the same questions everywhere so you can compare fairly. Our touring checklist covers what to look for, and what's not included in the monthly rate explains how to compare true costs, not sticker prices.

    Community in Pleasanton missing? Add it to the directory - anyone can suggest one, and if you work there we'll help you fill in the full profile.

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families, and the resident's quality of life comes first here - then the family, then the facility. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice - for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
